underlying_goal: Improve the trip wizard's timezone handling by auto-detecting timezone from the destination city instead of requiring manual IANA timezone input
friction_detail: Claude asked clarifying questions where user gave ambiguous one-word answers ('yes', 'a'), causing minor back-and-forth confusion.
brief_summary: User wanted auto-detected timezone in the trip wizard; Claude produced a design spec and was writing an implementation plan when the usage limit was hit.
